report.title: Reports
report.titleTip: History of sent Excel files. Reports are generated on schedule from your subscriptions — the weekday is set in settings. Several reports for one day are combined into a single file with separate sheets.
report.emptyHint: Your sent Excel report history will appear here
report.empty.title: No reports yet
report.empty.hasSubsPost: subscriptions. The first report will arrive on the chosen weekday at 12:00 MSK.
report.empty.noSubs: Set up subscriptions — choose which reports to receive and on which weekday. By default, all 7 report types are already added for Monday.
report.skippedNoData: There was no data for that day with the selected filters
report.err.telegramNoChat: Report not sent: Telegram isn't connected. Link your account under «Account» → Telegram.
report.err.telegramBlocked: Report not delivered: the bot is blocked or the chat is unavailable. Unblock the bot in Telegram and reconnect your account.
report.err.emailNotSet: Report not sent: no email address. Add one under «Account».
report.err.emailTransient: Report not sent by email — the mail service didn't respond. The next report will arrive on schedule.
report.err.emailInvalid: Report not sent: the email looks invalid. Check the address under «Account».
report.err.genericEmail: Report not sent by email. We're already looking into it.
report.err.genericTelegram: Report not delivered to Telegram. We're already looking into it.
